payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and a long vertical brushed-metal handle on the right; surface appears matte with slight sheen, mostly visible in the crop though slightly cropped at the top edge; estimated distance ~1.5 m from camera.
